aeo_readiness.summary: Global Arch Construction is not fully optimized for AI-driven search, making it less likely for AI assistants like ChatGPT or Claude to cite them as a top recommendation.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup to provide AI with structured data about the business.
Create an FAQ section with commonly asked questions and detailed answers to improve conversational content.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained with positive reviews, photos, and accurate contact information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and platforms.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citations.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for detailed project guides

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes it difficult for AI to understand and recommend their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'best design-build firms in Northern California' or 'trusted commercial contractors in Roseville'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness schema and an FAQ section with detailed answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as industry experts by publishing detailed project guides, certifications, and media coverage.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches and recommendations.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less likely for AI assistants to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes implementing structured data, creating FAQ content, and enhancing GBP engagement to boost AI visibility and drive more qualified leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in AI-driven search results.

email_subject_line: Boost Your AI Visibility: Optimize for ChatGPT & AI Search Now!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to improve your AI-driven search presence.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI and boost your lead generation.
page_title: Northern California Design-Build Experts | Global Arch Construction
